languages.title: Ururimi
languages.subtitle: Hitamo imvugo ikoreshwa muri porogaramu.
languages.noResults: Nta ndimi zihuye no gushakisha kwawe.

phone.label: Inomero ya terefone
phone.searchCountry: Shakisha igihugu, kode, cyangwa guhamagara prefix
phone.tooShort: Iyi nimero ya terefone ni ngufi cyane.
phone.tooLong: Iyi nimero ya terefone ni ndende cyane.
phone.invalid: Kwinjiza numero ya terefone yemewe mugihugu cyatoranijwe.

auth.onboardingTagline: Umufasha wumutekano wawe kumwanya uri hagati ya "Meze neza" na "Nkeneye ubufasha."
auth.createSubtitle: Hitamo uburyo bwo kwinjira kugirango urinde igishushanyo cyumutekano wawe.
auth.signInFailedMessage: Ntabwo twashoboye kurangiza kwinjira. Reba aho uhurira hanyuma ugerageze.
auth.googleUnavailableMessage: Gukoresha icyiciro cyiterambere. KavukireGoogle Kwinjira-Gukora mubikorwa byubaka.
auth.northStarSubtitle: Hindura nonaha cyangwa komeza hanyuma wongere nyuma.
auth.northStarBody: KwambaraVL01 birashobora gukurura umutekano utemba hamwe na kanda ndende.
auth.meetCapybearSubtitle: Umufasha wawe witonda wumutekano kurikarita no guhamagara.
auth.capybearBody: Capybear irashobora gufasha muburyo bwurugo, uburyo bwo kurinda, uburyo bwihutirwa, urwitwazo rwo guhamagara, hamwe no gushyigikira ijwi.

permissions.locationSubtitle: Byakoreshejwe ku ikarita, ahantu hashobora guteza akaga, kuhagera neza, naSOS imiterere.
permissions.locationBody: VeryLoving isaba ahantu kugirango abarinzi bashobore kumva aho ubufasha bukenewe. Urashobora guhindura ibi nyuma muri Igenamiterere.
permissions.notificationsBody: Dukoresha gusa imenyesha ryibibazo byumutekano, ivugurura ryihutirwa, hamwe nibutsa ubishoboye.
permissions.locationRationaleMessage: VeryLoving ikoresha aho uherereye ku ikarita yumutekano, ahantu hashobora guteza akaga, kugabana byihuse, naSOS imiterere. Urashobora guhindura ibi nyuma muri Igenamiterere.
permissions.notificationsRationaleMessage: VeryLoving yohereza kwibutsa-kwibutsa, kuvugurura byihutirwa, hamwe numutekano bigushoboza. Ntabwo dukoresha imenyekanisha ryamamaza.
permissions.microphoneRationaleTitle: Mikoro itanga imbaraga zo guhamagara umutekano
permissions.microphoneRationaleMessage: VeryLoving ikoresha mikoro yawe gusa mugihe utangiyeAI mugenzi wawe cyangwa guhamagara umutekano.
permissions.bluetoothRationaleMessage: VeryLoving ikoreshaBluetooth kugirango ihuze naNorthStar imitako, soma imiterere ihuza, kandi itere umutekano umutekano uva kwambara.
permissions.cameraRationaleMessage: VeryLoving ikoresha kamera gusa mugihe uhisemo gufata ifoto yumwirondoro cyangwa gusangira ishusho yumutekano.

tutorial.sharedBody: VeryLoving ituma iyi flux iboneka kuva Igenamiterere hamwe na bande.
tutorial.chooseVoiceSubtitle: Toranya ijwi rya mugenzi wawe wumva ufite umutekano kumva.
tutorial.homeSubtitle: Gukurikirana ituze kumutekano wa buri munsi.
tutorial.emergencySubtitle: Kanda eshanu zirashobora kwiyongera kuriSOS hamwe no kuburira.
tutorial.excuseSubtitle: Kora impamvu nziza yo gusiga ibintu bitameze neza.
tutorial.practiceSubtitle: Gerageza umutekano utemba muri demo yumuvuduko muke.

jewelry.pairSubtitle: Bika imitako hafi mugihe urimo gusikana.
jewelry.noDevices: Nta bikoresho biri hafiNorthStar ibikoresho byabonetse.
jewelry.scanStartFailed: Bluetooth gusikana ntibishobora gutangira. Nyamuneka gerageza.
jewelry.scanFailed: Ntabwo twashoboraga kubona imitako iri hafi. RebaBluetooth, komezaNorthStar hafi, hanyuma ugerageze.
jewelry.scanAccessFailed: Bluetooth gusikana ntibishobora gutangira. RebaBluetooth kwinjira hanyuma ugerageze.
jewelry.permissionDenied: Hafi y'ibikoresho-bikoresho birahari. EmereraBluetooth kwinjira muri Igenamiterere, hanyuma ugerageze.
jewelry.connectTimeout: NorthStar byafashe igihe kinini kugirango uhuze. Himura hafi hanyuma ugerageze.
jewelry.connectFailed: Ntabwo twashoboye guhuzaNorthStar. Reba neza ko yishyuwe kandi hafi, hanyuma ugerageze.
jewelry.emptyMessage: KomezaNorthStar yishyuwe kandi wegere iyi terefone, hanyuma wongere usuzume.

home.subtitle: Ikibaho cyiza cya mugenzi wawe
home.readyBody: Ijwi, ikarita, imitako, n'abashinzwe kurinda ni kanda imwe.

map.title: Ikarita yumutekano
map.previewSubtitle: Expo Go kureba; Mapbox itanga mubikorwa byubaka.
map.updateFailed: Ntabwo twashoboraga kuvugurura aho uherereye. Nyamuneka gerageza.
map.notRequested: Kwinjira ahantu ntibyasabwe. Urashobora kubishobora nyuma uhereye kuri Igenamiterere.
map.permissionOff: Kubona ahantu birahari. Gushoboza muri Igenamiterere kugirango ushireho ikarita yumutekano kuri wewe.
map.timeout: Ikibanza cyawe kirimo gufata igihe kirenze icyari giteganijwe. Himura ahantu hamwe nibimenyetso bisobanutse hanyuma ugerageze.
map.savedEmptyMessage: Ahantu hizewe uzigama hazagaragara hano kugirango byihuse.
map.geofenceEntered: You entered the %{radius}m saved-place safety zone.
map.geofenceExited: You left the %{radius}m saved-place safety zone.

safetyCall.connectingSecurely: Guhuza neza na mugenzi wawe ijwi ...
safetyCall.emptyMessage: Tangira guhamagara cyangwa wandike ubutumwa mugihe witeguye.

history.clearMessage: Ibi bivanaho ubutumwa bwabitsweAI igikoresho cyiki gikoresho.
history.title: Amateka y'ibiganiro
history.subtitle: AI ubutumwa bwa mugenzi wabitswe kuri iki gikoresho.
history.emptyMessage: Ibiganiro byaweAI mugenzi wawe bizagaragara hano nyuma yo guhamagara kwambere.
history.loadFailed: Ntabwo twashoboraga kwikorera amateka y'ibiganiro. Nyamuneka gerageza.
history.clearFailed: Ntabwo twashoboye gukuraho amateka y'ibiganiro. Nyamuneka gerageza.
history.deleteFailed: Ntabwo twashoboye gusiba icyo kiganiro. Nyamuneka gerageza.

voices.title: Ijwi ryanjye ryo guhamagara umutekano
voices.subtitle: Hitamo ijwi rya mugenzi wawe wumva neza kumva.
voices.sampleFailedMessage: Uru rugero rwijwi ntirushobora gucurangwa. Nyamuneka gerageza.

settings.offlineModeSubtitle: Koresha ibisubizo bya mugenzi wawe ibisubizo mugihe umuyoboro cyangwaHume ibyangombwa bitabonetse.
settings.privacyBody: Kohereza cyangwa gusiba amakuru yaho abitswe kuri iki gikoresho.
settings.deleteConfirmMessage: Ibi bivanaho umwirondoro wawe, igenamiterere, imibonano yihutirwa, amateka y'ibiganiro, kwibutsa uruhushya, hamwe na auth ya sesi yo muri iki gikoresho.
settings.deleteFailedMessage: Ntushobora gusiba amakuru yaho muri kano kanya.

sections.privacySubtitle: Amateka, kohereza hanze, gusiba, na politiki

settings.updateFailedMessage: Ntabwo twashoboraga kubika ibyo ukunda. Nyamuneka gerageza.

contacts.title: Itumanaho ryihutirwa
contacts.subtitle: Abantu bizewe baraboneka mugihe umutekano ugenda.
contacts.name: Izina
contacts.emptyMessage: Ongeraho umuntu wizeye kugirango yitegure mugihe umutekano ukenewe.
contacts.removeMessage: Uyu muntu ntazongera kugaragara mubyihutirwa byihutirwa.
contacts.saveFailedMessage: Ntabwo twashoboye kubika iyi contact. Reba ibisobanuro hanyuma ugerageze.
contacts.removeFailedMessage: Ntabwo twashoboye gukuraho iyi contact. Nyamuneka gerageza.

friends.title: Nshuti
friends.subtitle: Abarinzi, ibyifuzo, n'ibishushanyo byihutirwa.
friends.emptyMessage: Inshuti zizewe nabarezi bazagaragara hano nibamara kongerwaho.

emergency.title: Ibihe byihutirwaSOS
emergency.subtitle: Garagaza gusa mugihe ukeneye ubufasha bwihuse.
emergency.body: Ibi bizamenyesha umutekano wawe kandi utegure ibyihutirwa.
emergency.quickShareMessage: Ahantu ho kugabana stub iriteguye. Huza umugabane winyuma kugirango wohereze amahuza nzima.

capybearTap.title: Capybear kanda
capybearTap.subtitle: Kanda inshuro ebyiriNorthStar kugirango uta orange umutekano.
capybearTap.body: Inzira yerekana ibimenyetso yiteguye kuri BLE ibyabaye.

errors.voiceOffline: Urasa na interineti. Ubutumwa bwawe buzoherezwa mugihe wongeye guhura.
errors.voiceQueued: Ubutumwa bwakijijwe. Bizoherezwa mugihe ijwi rya mugenzi wawe ryongeye guhura.
errors.voiceConnecting: Guhuza neza na mugenzi wawe ijwi ...
errors.microphone: Microphone irakenewe muguhamagara amajwi. Urashobora kubishobora muri Igenamiterere, cyangwa wandike ubutumwa aho.
errors.billing: Umuyoboro wijwi kumurongo ntushobora kuboneka byigihe gito. Urashobora gukomeza hamwe na mugenzi wawe kumurongo.
errors.authentication: Mugenzi wijwi ntashobora kugenzura iki cyiciro. Ongera winjire cyangwa ukoreshe umurongo wa interineti kuri ubu.
errors.timeout: Mugenzi wijwi yafashe umwanya muremure kugirango adasubiza. Reba aho uhurira hanyuma ugerageze.
errors.network: Ntabwo twashoboye kugera kumajwi mugenzi wawe. Reba aho uhurira, hanyuma ugerageze nanone cyangwa ukomeze kumurongo.
errors.genericVoice: Ikintu cyahagaritse guhamagara ijwi. Gerageza nanone, cyangwa ukomeze hamwe na mugenzi wawe kumurongo.

ios.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: VeryLoving akeneye mikoro kugirango abone umutekano naAI umuhamagaro.
ios.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: VeryLoving ikoresha aho uherereye ku ikarita yumutekano hamwe nibiranga umutekano hafi.
ios.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: VeryLoving ikoreshaBluetooth kugirango uhuzeNorthStar imitako yumutekano.

releaseCritical.authUnavailable: Ubu buryo bwo kwinjira ntibuboneka muri iyi verisiyo.
releaseCritical.demoModeNotice: Uburyo bw'igerageza bukoresha gusa amakuru y'impimbano abitswe kuri iki gikoresho. Serivisi zihujwe ntizemejwe, kandi iyi sesiyo isubirwamo iyo porogaramu yongeye gufungurwa.
releaseCritical.authCodeInvalid: Kode yo kwemeza ntiyemewe cyangwa yararengeje igihe. Saba kode nshya, wongere ugerageze.
releaseCritical.authRateLimited: Wagerageje kwinjira inshuro nyinshi cyane. Tegereza gato, wongere ugerageze.
releaseCritical.authTimeout: Kwemeza kwinjira byatinze cyane. Reba interineti yawe, wongere ugerageze.
releaseCritical.authNetwork: Ntitwashoboye kugera kuri serivisi yo kwinjira. Reba interineti yawe, wongere ugerageze.
releaseCritical.mapUnavailable: Ikarita y'umutekano ntiyashoboye gufunguka. Reba interineti yawe, wongere ugerageze.
releaseCritical.mapCachedLocation: Aho uri ubu ntihaboneka. Harerekanwa aho uheruka kubika kuva %{capturedAt}.
releaseCritical.locationShareFailed: Ntitwashoboye gusangiza aho uri. Reba uburenganzira bwo kubona aho uri, wongere ugerageze.
releaseCritical.locationShareCurrent: Dore aho nari ndi igihe cyanditswe kuri %{capturedAt}:
releaseCritical.locationShareCached: Dore aho mperuka kubika, handitswe kuri %{capturedAt}:
releaseCritical.blePermission: Uburenganzira bwa Bluetooth burazimye. Bwemere muri Igenamiterere, wongere ugerageze.
releaseCritical.bleUnavailable: Guhuza na Bluetooth ntibiboneka kuri iki gikoresho cyangwa iyi verisiyo.
releaseCritical.bleScanFailed: Ntitwashoboye kubona NorthStar. Yigumize hafi, reba Bluetooth, wongere ugerageze.
releaseCritical.bleNoDevices: Nta bikoresho bya NorthStar biri hafi byabonetse. Yigumize hafi, wongere ushakishe.
releaseCritical.bleConnectFailed: Ntitwashoboye guhuza na NorthStar. Menya ko ifite umuriro kandi iri hafi, wongere ugerageze.
releaseCritical.savePlaceFailed: Ntitwashoboye kubika aha hantu. Ongera ugerageze.
releaseCritical.sosDialerOpened: Aho guhamagarira kuri telefoni harafungutse; guhamagara ntikwemejwe.
releaseCritical.sosContactRequired: Nta muntu wo gutabaza wabonetse; nta guhamagara kwabaye.
releaseCritical.sosDialerFailed: Aho guhamagarira kuri telefoni ntihashoboye gufunguka; nta guhamagara kwabaye.
releaseCritical.sosUnknown: Igerageza rya SOS riheruka ntiryashoboye kwemezwa.
releaseCritical.voiceConfiguration: Mugenzi w'ijwi ntaboneka ubu. Ongera ugerageze nyuma cyangwa ukomeze ukoreshe mugenzi udakenera interineti.

medicalProfile.title: Emergency medical profile
medicalProfile.subtitle: Information you choose to share during an SOS
medicalProfile.description: Keep this information current. VeryLoving attaches it only to a connected SOS after you enable sharing; it is not sent through the phone call itself.
medicalProfile.conditionsHint: Enter one per line or separate items with commas.
medicalProfile.allergiesHint: Enter one per line or separate items with commas.
medicalProfile.medicationsHint: Enter one per line: name | dose | instructions.
medicalProfile.emergencyNotesHint: Add details that may help your emergency contacts.
medicalProfile.shareLabel: Include this profile with connected SOS alerts
medicalProfile.shareHint: When enabled, reviewed details may be sent to your synchronized emergency flow.
medicalProfile.consentBody: Saving with sharing enabled records your consent and review time. You can turn sharing off or clear this profile at any time.
medicalProfile.saved: Medical profile saved and review time recorded.
medicalProfile.loadFailed: We could not load your medical profile. Try again.
medicalProfile.saveFailed: We could not save your medical profile. Check the entries and try again.
medicalProfile.clearFailed: We could not clear your medical profile. Try again.
medicalProfile.clearMessage: This removes the emergency medical information stored securely on this device.

medication.title: Medication reminders
medication.subtitle: Schedule home robot reminders and caregiver escalation.
medication.referenceHint: Use a short private schedule reference with letters, numbers, hyphens, or underscores.
medication.noRobot: Pair a home robot before adding medication reminders.
medication.escalationHint: Caregivers are alerted only if the reminder remains unacknowledged.
medication.saveFailed: We could not save this medication reminder. Check the entries and try again.
medication.loadFailed: We could not load medication reminders. Try again.
medication.acknowledgeFailed: We could not acknowledge this medication reminder. Try again.

wellness.title: Wellbeing & connected care
wellness.subtitle: Gentle activities, emotional check-ins, and coordinated device support.
wellness.connectedCareUnavailable: Connected care needs a signed-in account and the VeryLoving service. Local activities and mood history still work on this device.
wellness.scenarioFailed: Connected care could not start or update. Check your connection and try again.

cognitive.title: Cognitive engagement
cognitive.subtitle: Choose a light memory game, a trivia question, or a conversation prompt.
cognitive.connectedBody: Ask your home companion to start a gentle activity and follow its progress here.
cognitive.connectedHint: Starts the cognitive engagement scenario on your account-bound devices.
cognitive.activitySubtitle: There is no score to chase. Pick what feels comfortable today.
cognitive.emptyMessage: Memory, trivia, and conversation are ready whenever you are.

memory.title: Memory cards
memory.description: Notice three symbols, then recall the middle one.

trivia.title: Friendly trivia
trivia.description: Answer a familiar question at your own pace.

conversation.title: Conversation prompt
conversation.description: Use a warm prompt to recall and share a story.

memory.title: Remember the middle symbol
memory.instruction: Take a moment to look at this sequence.
memory.question: Which symbol was in the middle?
memory.incorrect: Good try. Take another look and go at your own pace.

trivia.title: Friendly trivia
trivia.incorrect: Not this time—and that is completely okay.

one.prompt: What color is a clear daytime sky?

two.prompt: What is the largest organ of the human body?

three.prompt: How many days are in a week?

prompts.one: What is a meal that brings back a happy memory?
prompts.two: Who taught you something you still use today?
prompts.three: What song always lifts your mood?
prompts.four: What is a place you would enjoy visiting again?

emotional.title: Emotional check-in
emotional.subtitle: Notice how you feel, save a short reflection, or invite your companion to talk.
emotional.moodQuestion: How are you feeling right now?
emotional.moodHint: Choose the closest answer. There is no wrong choice.
emotional.reflectionHint: Keep it brief. Raw voice audio and transcripts are not saved here.
emotional.reflectionPlaceholder: A few words about this moment...
emotional.privacyNote: Your mood history is account-bound, included in privacy export, and removed with account data deletion.
emotional.saveFailed: We could not save this check-in. Please try again.
emotional.connectedBody: Start a consent-aware Hume conversation through your home companion. A user-started check-in never invents a stress reading.
emotional.connectedHint: Starts an emotional check-in on your account-bound home companion.
emotional.historySubtitle: Only your last 90 private check-ins are retained on this device.
emotional.historyLoadFailed: We could not load your check-in history.
emotional.historyEmptyMessage: Choose a mood above when you are ready.
emotional.deleteMessage: This removes the mood and short reflection from this device.
emotional.deleteFailed: We could not delete this check-in. Please try again.
emotional.humeContextNotice: When you start reflection, your selected mood and optional summary are shared as temporary Hume context. They are not treated as a stress reading.

scenarios.title: Connected care scenarios
scenarios.subtitle: Coordinate your wearable and home companion with clear safety boundaries.
scenarios.connectedCareBody: VeryLoving resolves your paired devices on the server, prevents duplicate actions, and tracks every execution.
scenarios.demoOffline: Demo mode never creates a bearer token, so connected scenarios stay offline. Sign in with a real development account to test the server flow.
scenarios.signInRequired: Sign in again to use connected care scenarios.
scenarios.notConfigured: Connected care is not configured in this build.
scenarios.networkError: The connected care service could not be reached. Your wearable can still work over Bluetooth.
scenarios.stillRunning: This scenario is still running. Refresh its status shortly.
scenarios.genericError: The connected care action could not be completed. Please retry.
scenarios.chooseActionBody: Actions with safety consequences always explain what will happen before they start.

descriptions.fall_detection: Run an analytics-only practice. It never moves a robot or alerts a contact.
descriptions.medication_adherence: Ask the robot to remind you now; unconfirmed reminders can escalate to a caregiver.
descriptions.emotional_check_in: Invite a calming, consent-aware Hume conversation.
descriptions.cognitive_engagement: Invite a gentle robot activity and voice game.
descriptions.ai_angel_auto_dial: Start the confirmed cross-device emergency flow.

confirmations.practiceBody: This records a practice event only. It will not move the robot, call anyone, or send an emergency alert.
confirmations.medicationBody: The robot will remind you now. If you do not confirm within the adherence window, the configured caregiver escalation can run.
confirmations.emergencyBody: This starts the real emergency workflow across your paired devices and may contact your configured emergency contact.
confirmations.cancelCriticalBody: Stopping a critical scenario can end active emergency steps. Continue only if you are sure help is no longer needed.

scenarios.wellnessToolsBody: Check in privately or choose an activity before involving connected devices.
scenarios.recentActivityBody: Status is encrypted, account-bound, and refreshed while work is active.
scenarios.emptyMessage: Start a wellbeing check-in or another quick action when you are ready.
scenarios.started: Scenario accepted. Live status is updating.
scenarios.fallbackNote: A planned fallback completed because a preferred step was unavailable.
scenarios.failedNote: The scenario could not finish. Check device connectivity and try again if it is safe.

feedback.title: Was this helpful?
feedback.message: Tell us whether %{interaction} supported you. We save only the rating, not a free-text response.
feedback.helpfulHint: Records a thumbs-up rating for this completed interaction.
feedback.notHelpfulHint: Records a thumbs-down rating for this completed interaction.
feedback.error: We could not save your rating. Please try again.
